data_fidelity_note: Positions below are APPROXIMATE anchor-relative placeholders (km). CIG does not publish canonical Pyro coordinates (see R4). Expect crowdsourced reports via Supabase to supplant these values.

pull_points.name: Stanton-Pyro jump corridor (Pyro side)
pull_points.notes: R4 §3 rank 1. Highest-traffic inbound lane in Pyro. Approximate — anchor at the jump exit.

pull_points.name: Ruin Station approach cone
pull_points.notes: R4 §3 rank 2. XenoThreat-adjacent; placeholder at Terminus orbital distance (~68.3 Gm from Pyro).

pull_points.name: Ruin ↔ Checkmate corridor midpoint
pull_points.notes: R4 §3 rank 3 / §4 PY-REFSELL-1. Classic pirate lane; midpoint placeholder between Terminus and Monox L4.

pull_points.name: Checkmate Station (Monox L4) approach
pull_points.notes: R4 §3 rank 4. R&R-controlled but not immune to rival packs.

pull_points.name: Orbituary approach (Bloom high orbit)
pull_points.notes: R4 §3 rank 5. Outlaw refinery; loaded cargo exits = ambush bait.

pull_points.name: Bloom L-point crossing (Starlight / Patch City)
pull_points.notes: R4 §3 rank 6. Short intra-Bloom legs invite light-pirate crossings.
